evals.expected_output: Reads dissent-register.md and sprint-status.md, then produces a table with columns: Dissent summary | Review trigger | Status (Met / Not Yet) | Recommended action. If no dissent exists, says so and suggests running a sprint.

evals.prompt: Before we start the next sprint, can we check if any of Elias's past challenges need revisiting?
evals.expected_output: Should trigger review-dissent. Cross-references dissent entries against sprint history. Correctly identifies which trigger conditions have been met based on completed sprints.

evals.prompt: Elias dissented on the navigation decision 3 sprints ago. His review trigger was 'if usability testing shows confusion'. Has that condition been met?
evals.expected_output: Reads dissent register and sprint history. Assesses whether usability testing evidence appears in subsequent sprint records. Gives a clear Met / Not Yet verdict with rationale.

evals.prompt: I want to add a new feature to the dashboard. Can you help me write the code?
evals.expected_output: SHOULD NOT trigger review-dissent skill. Pure implementation task. Skill stays quiet.

evals.prompt: We've just finished sprint 5 on checkout improvements. Are there any dissent entries from earlier sprints that might be relevant now?
evals.expected_output: Triggers review-dissent. Reviews all open dissent entries, compares against completed sprints (including sprint 5), and surfaces any whose review trigger has been met.
